name: elemental-air-node
summary: A pocket of the Elemental Plane of Air. The 'floor' is a solidified cloud-shelf; walls are defined by perpetual gale, and luminous wisps orbit a singing vortex at the center.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: circular or oval — wind does not tolerate corners

accent.purpose: denser cloud-core or wind-spiral at the center

primary_palette.note: a central wind-singularity with orbiting wisps
the chime IS the node, sounded by eternal breeze

story_prompts: a djinn noble entertains an aarakocra emissary on the floating pavilion
the vortex has slowed — something is dying, and the wind is dropping
storm giants have anchored a drifting fortress to the node
empty, singing — a chorus of wind-chimes keyed to the node's breath
a planar tear leaks air toward the material plane, fueling a distant hurricane

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: bright diffuse (0.55-0.7) with pale silver-blue; light has no single source

anti_patterns: no furniture that can't plausibly float or be anchored
no fire sources — everything here is wind, light, and lightning
walls are conceptual — use invisible walls (iw) so the cloud-shelf reads as open sky
avoid clutter on the floor; drift should be vertical, not horizontal
